references.title: Topo the World
references.curriculum_fit: Foundations of topological thinking for TDA and Poincaré embeddings

references.title: Here's Looking at Euclid
references.curriculum_fit: Geometric foundations for fretboard geometry and spatial reasoning

references.title: Bourbakof
references.topic: Abstract algebra — group theory, mathematical structures
references.curriculum_fit: Group theory for pitch class groups, symmetry in music theory

references.title: Logotron
references.topic: Mathematical logic — formal systems, proof theory
references.curriculum_fit: Foundations for tetravalent logic, formal verification, grammar theory

references.title: Computer Magic
references.topic: Computing — information theory, digital logic, algorithms
references.curriculum_fit: Fundamentals for understanding constrained generation and digital signal processing

references.title: Run Robot Run
references.topic: Robotics — automation, control systems, agent behavior
references.curriculum_fit: Agent behavior foundations, governance as control theory analogy

references.title: Everything is Relative
references.topic: Special and general relativity — spacetime, reference frames
references.curriculum_fit: Reference frame thinking applicable to multi-perspective governance

references.title: The Silence Barrier
references.curriculum_fit: Acoustics foundations for understanding string vibration and harmonics

references.title: The Black Hole
references.curriculum_fit: Extreme physics as thinking tool for boundary conditions and singularities

references.title: The Economicon
references.curriculum_fit: Resource allocation thinking for budget management and prioritization

references.title: Big Bang
references.topic: Cosmology — origin of the universe, early physics
references.curriculum_fit: Large-scale systems thinking, initial conditions and emergence
